name: Allure Queen LV5
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魅惑の女王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アリュール・クィーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レベル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>５
desc: Once per turn, if you control this card that was Special Summoned by the effect of "Allure Queen LV3": You can target 1 Level 5 or lower monster your opponent controls; equip that target to this card as an Equip Spell (max. 1). If this card would be destroyed by battle, destroy that equipped monster, instead. During your Standby Phase: You can send this card equipped with a monster by this card's effect to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Allure Queen LV7" from your hand or Deck.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if you control this card that was Special Summoned by the effect of "Allure Queen LV3": You can target 1 Level 5 or lower monster your opponent controls; equip that target to this card as an Equip Spell (max. 1). If this card would be destroyed by battle, destroy that equipped monster, instead. action: Equips monsters from the opponent's field to itself
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
